news.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
news.summary: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

news.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
news.summary: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

news.title: YouTube Premium and YouTube Music are getting more expensive
news.summary: The YouTube Premium individual plan is increasing from $13.99 to $15.99 per month, while the family plan is increasing from $22.99 to $26.99 per month.

news.title: Amazon Luna axes third-party game purchases
news.summary: Amazon Luna announced a big change on Friday that will prevent players from purchasing third-party games and subscriptions. news.title: Anthropic’s Mythos Will Force a Cybersecurity Reckoning—Just Not the One You Think
news.summary: The new AI model is being heralded—and feared—as a hacker’s superweapon. Experts say its arrival is a wake-up call for developers who have long made security an afterthought.

news.title: The Future of the Artemis Program Is Riding on Reentry
news.summary: Entire space programs have been canceled after a failure in the reentry phase. In the final test for Artemis II, astronauts will travel at 32 times the speed of sound as they return from the moon.

news.title: Suspect Arrested for Allegedly Throwing Molotov Cocktail at Sam Altman’s Home
news.summary: An attacker allegedly threw a molotov cocktail at the OpenAI CEO’s residence before making threats outside of the startup’s headquarters.
